IsSynchronizedWithOtherSkillsOfTheSameIt.description: If true, Synchronize() propagates currentStacks to all AccuracyStacksHandler instances on same actor, sharing stacks across item's skills.

Amount.description: Number of equipment slots to add. Default 1. Range 1-4 typical.

SlotType.description: ItemSlot enum type (Weapon, Armor, Consumable, etc.).

Event.description: Trigger type: 0=OnApply, 1=WhenAdded, 2=OnHit, 3=WhenRemoved, 4=OnCrit, 5=OnMissionStarted, 6=OnRoundStart. Determines when SkillToAdd gets applied.

enum_values.0: OnApply - skill added when effect applied to target tile
enum_values.1: WhenAdded - skill added to self when parent skill added
enum_values.2: OnHit - skill added to hit target on successful hit
enum_values.3: WhenRemoved - skill added to self when parent skill removed
enum_values.4: OnCrit - skill added only on critical hit
enum_values.5: OnMissionStarted - skill added at mission start
enum_values.6: OnRoundStart - skill added each round start

SkillToAdd.description: Skill template to instantiate and add to target. Creates via SkillTemplate.CreateSkill(), sets CasterActor and SourceSkill on created skill.

OnlyApplyOnHit.description: Only used in OnApply handler. If true, requires hit confirmation (non-zero param). Filters out misses.

OnlyUsableOnTargetsWithoutSkill.description: Checks TARGET doesn't have skill. Used in IsApplicableTo and OnTargetHit. Prevents duplicate application to same target.

OnlyApplyWhenNoElementWasDestroyed.description: MISLABELED: Actually 'OnlyApplyOnNonCrit'. If true, only adds skill when HitResult.IsCritical is false. Inverted crit check.
OnlyApplyWhenNoElementWasDestroyed.note: Name is misleading - has nothing to do with elements

OnlyApplyOnHitpointDamage.description: If true, requires HitResult.Damage > 0. Only triggers on actual HP damage (not just armor damage or zero damage).

OnlyWhenSkillNotPresent.description: Checks SELF doesn't have skill. Used in AddSkillToSelf for OnMissionStarted/OnRoundStart. Different from 0x69.
OnlyWhenSkillNotPresent.note: NOT a duplicate of 0x69 - this checks actor, 0x69 checks target

Condition.description: Optional condition evaluated before adding skill. Called with (actor, target, skill). Returns early if false.

ShowHUDText.description: If true, displays skill name on target's UnitHUD using SkillToAdd.Name and SkillToAdd.IconColor via UnitHUD.ShowDropDownText().

TargetRequiresOneOfTheseTags.description: Target must have at least one tag from this list. Uses Entity.HasAnyOfTheseTags(). Empty = no requirement.

TargetCannotHaveOneOfTheseTags.description: Target must NOT have any tag from this list. Uses Entity.HasAnyOfTheseTags(). Empty = no restriction.

SkillToAdd.description: Skill template to create and add when trigger skill is used.

SkillFilter.description: Optional filter determining which skill usages trigger the add. Null = any skill triggers.

BonusPercentage.description: Multiplier for base max ammo. Default 0.5 (50% bonus). Formula: bonus = max(baseMaxAmmo * BonusPercentage, MinBonus).

SkillFilter.description: Optional filter for which skills receive the ammo bonus.

AmmoMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to base max ammo (from item template 0xbc)

MinBonus.description: Minimum ammo to add if percentage gives less. Default 2.

AmmoType.description: Ammo type to match against Item.Template+0xEC. Default 1.

ChanceToApply.description: Probability (0-100 integer) that skill applies. Uses PseudoRandom.NextPercent(). Default 100.

SkillTemplate.description: Skill template to apply to self when event triggers.

Attack._formula_notes: Damage = (Base + Dropoff*range) * Mult. Multipliers use AddMult: current += (mult-1.0). Percentages are 0.0-1.0 fractional.

ApplyMode.description: Controls when attack applies. 0 = instant apply, non-zero = deferred application.

ElementsHit.description: Number of elements/targets hit. Default 1. Displayed in tooltip for multi-hit attacks.

ElementsHitPercentage.description: Percentage multiplier for elements hit. Value range 0.0-1.0 (fractional, NOT 0-100).

DestroysCoverClass.description: Cover class level this attack can destroy (1=half, 2=full). Destroys cover where coverClass <= this value.

Condition.description: Optional condition. If fails in OnBeforeTargetHit, damage values (0x2C, 0x3C, 0x34) are zeroed.

CanDestroyOnlyEmptyCover.description: If true, only destroys cover when tile is empty.

Damage.description: Base damage value. Additive to EntityProperties.

DamageMult.description: Damage multiplier. Uses AddMult stacking: current += (mult-1.0). Multiple 1.5x = 2.0x total.

DamageDropoff.description: Damage reduction per tile beyond ideal range. Typically NEGATIVE for damage reduction.

DamageDropoffAOE.description: Damage dropoff for AOE/splash per tile from center.

DamagePctCurrentHitpoints.description: Percentage of target's CURRENT HP as bonus damage. Value range 0.0-1.0 (fractional).

DamagePctCurrentHitpointsMin.description: Minimum damage from percentage current HP calculation.

DamagePctMaxHitpoints.description: Percentage of target's MAX HP as bonus damage. Value range 0.0-1.0 (fractional).

DamagePctMaxHitpointsMin.description: Minimum damage from percentage max HP calculation.

ArmorPenetration.description: Armor penetration value. If AP >= TargetArmor, full damage penetrates.

ArmorPenetrationMult.description: Armor penetration multiplier. Uses AddMult stacking.

ArmorPenetrationDropoff.description: Armor pen reduction per tile from ideal range.

ArmorPenetrationDropoffAOE.description: Armor pen dropoff for AOE attacks.

DamageToArmorDurability.description: Direct damage to armor durability (destroys armor over time).

DamageToArmorDurabilityDropoff.description: Armor durability damage dropoff per tile.

AccuracyDropoff.description: Accuracy reduction per tile from ideal range. Typically NEGATIVE.

SuppressionBase.description: Base suppression value applied on hit.

TargetRequiresOneOfTheseTags.description: Target must have at least one of these tags for attack to apply.

TargetCannotHaveOneOfTheseTags.description: Target must NOT have any of these tags.

Attack._crit_fields_note: CritChance and CritDamage are NOT in Attack effect. They are EntityProperties fields (0x78, 0x7C) set by leader attributes/perks. Crit formula: Roll PseudoRandom.NextTry(CritChance). On success: damage *= CritDamage.

ApplyPanic.description: If true (non-zero), applies morale with panic flag (0x100) to target. Causes immediate panic state.

ReduceMoraleLevel.description: Number of morale levels to reduce on target. Result 1=Panicked (morale=0), Result 2=Shaken (morale=50% max).

SkillToAdd.description: Template used to CreateSkill() and add to target's SkillContainer when proc triggers.

OnlyApplyWhenNoElementWasDestroyed.description: MISLEADING NAME: Actually 'OnlyApplyOnMiss'. If true, only triggers when HitResult.IsCritical is false.
OnlyApplyWhenNoElementWasDestroyed.note: Name is misleading - checks crit flag, not element destruction

OnlyApplyOnHitpointDamage.description: If true, only triggers on hits with HitResult.Damage > 0. Filters zero-damage and armor-only hits.

Chance.description: THIS FIELD DOES NOT EXIST. AttackProc is deterministic - triggers when conditions met (MissesOnly, OnlyOnDamage, Condition). No random chance.
Chance.note: Remove from schema - field was incorrectly assumed

ShowHUDText.description: If true AND target didn't already have the proc skill, displays floating HUD text via OnDisplayTextAndIcon().

ProcSkill.description: Skill template to instantiate and add to target

MissesOnly.description: If true, only triggers on misses (IsCritical != 0 means hit)

OnlyOnDamage.description: If true, only triggers when damage > 0

AnySkillTrigger.description: If true, any skill can trigger; if false, only handler's owner skill

ShowOnFirstTime.description: If true, shows HUD text/icon when skill first added

Duration.description: Main shake duration in seconds. Compared with Time.time for progress: t = (currentTime - startTime) / Duration. Default 1.0s.

RecoverTime.name: DecayTime
RecoverTime.description: Fade-out duration in seconds after main shake. Progress: t = (currentTime - shakeEnd) / DecayTime. Default 0.66s.

ShakeType.description: Shake pattern enum. 1-2=Linear shake, 3-4=Quake shake with quadratic falloff.

Intensity.description: Shake amplitude multiplier. Scales the camera offset. Default 1.4.

SkillFilter.description: Filter interface determining which skills are affected

APCostChange.description: Amount to change skill AP cost (negative reduces cost)

MinimumAPCost.description: Minimum AP cost threshold - skills with BaseCost < this are not affected

AdditionalDropChance.description: Additive modifier to drop chance (0-100 integer). Simply adds to existing drop probability.

BaseMalfunctionChance.description: Base modifier to malfunction chance (0-100 integer). Additive to entity's malfunction chance.

MalfunctionChancePerUse.description: Additional malfunction chance per use (0-100 integer). Formula: total = Base + (PerUse * useCount).

ApplyToTarget.description: If 0, applies morale to skill owner on addition. If 1, applies to target tile's actor.

Mode.description: MoraleMode enum determining target morale value. 0=None, 2=Half max (50%), 3=Full max.

Direction.description: MoraleDirection enum for boundary checking. 0=None, 1=MaxBound (don't lower if above target), 2=MinBound (don't raise if below).

ApplyOnEvent.description: Trigger enum: 0=ApplyToSelf (owner in OnAdded), 1=ApplyToTarget (target in OnApply).

enum_values.0: OnUpdate - continuous modification every update cycle
enum_values.1: OnBeingAttacked - triggered defensively when entity takes damage
enum_values.2: OnSkillUse - triggered before any skill is used

PropertyType.description: Enum specifying which entity property to modify. Properties 0-8, 29-42, 45-70 are additive; others are multiplicative.

Value.description: Base additive value for non-multiplicative properties. Formula: property += Value * (ValueProvider ?? 1)

ValueMult.description: Base multiplier value (default 1.0). Uses AddMult stacking: property += (ValueMult - 1.0). Multiple 50% bonuses stack as 1.0+0.5+0.5=2.0x

ValueProvider.description: Optional dynamic value scaler. For additive: Value * providerResult. For multiplicative: (ValueMult-1.0)*providerResult+1.0

StringValueIndex.description: Index into skill's string array for UI display. Default -1 (no display).

ShowPlus.description: If true, prepends '+' to positive values in UI display

Condition.description: Condition that gates property changes. If null or passes, changes apply.

Event.name: Mode
Event.description: Trigger mode enum. 0=OnSkillUsed (OnBeforeAnySkillUsed), 1=OnConditionOnly (OnUpdate, sets IsActive flag).

HideIfNotActive.description: If true AND IsActive is false, hides effect in skill tooltip.

ModifiedProperties.description: Array of property changes. Each is 12 bytes: PropertyType@+0 (int), Value@+4 (int), MultValue@+8 (float).

Amount.description: Additive value per stack. Formula: stackCount * Amount. Applied via UpdateProperty.

AmountMult.description: Multiplicative value per stack. Formula: stackCount * AmountMult. Applied via UpdateMultProperty (AddMult).

PropertyType.description: Which property to modify. Checked via IsMultProperty() to determine additive vs multiplicative formula.

MaxStacks.description: Maximum consecutive hit count. Caps stackCount for formula calculations.

SkillFilter.description: Filter for which skills have their ranges modified.
Filter for which skills are affected.

UsesAmount.description: Amount to add/subtract from skill uses consumed. Positive adds, negative subtracts. Reversed on removal.

UseAmountChange.description: The amount to add (positive) or subtract (negative) from skill uses consumed. Passed to Skill.ChangeUsesConsumed().

Amount.description: Additive modifier applied via UpdateProperty when PropertyType is not multiplicative.

AmountMult.description: Multiplicative modifier applied via UpdateMultProperty (uses AddMult stacking formula).

TargetTags.description: Skill must contain ALL these tags for effect to apply. Uses ContainsAllTags() check.

PropertyType.description: Which property to modify. Checked via IsMultProperty() for formula selection.

IsStanceRequiredToUse.description: If true, skill only usable/visible when actor is in RequiredStance.

RequiredStance (FilterByStance).description: Stance required for skills with this filter to be enabled/visible.

RequiresCurrentStance.description: If true, the skill is only visible/usable when actor is in a specific stance.

SoundWhenPinnedDown.description: Sound played when actor enters pinned down state (state 2).

CurrentStance.description: The actor's current stance (0=Standing, 1=Crouching, 2=Prone). Updated by SetStance.

Suppression.description: Current suppression value. Determines suppression state which auto-sets stance.

UnknownFlag.description: Flag cleared when stance becomes 0 (standing). Purpose unclear, possibly related to suppression recovery.

EffectData.description: Reference to the ChangeStance effect data containing TargetStance and other configuration.

PinnedDownSkill.description: Skill added when pinned down (state 2), removed when recovering from pinned down.

UsableWhenPinnedDown.description: Flag indicating skill can be used when pinned down (stance 2). Checked to determine if turn ends.

TargetStance.description: Stance to set on skill use.

RequiredStance.description: Stance actor must be in when IsStanceRequiredToUse is true.

Filter.description: Optional filter for which items have their supply costs modified.

field_0x10.description: Reference to the owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

field_0x58.description: TriggerType - When to apply effect: 0=OnApply (skill hits tile), 1=OnAdded (effect attached)

field_0x60.description: UseOwner - If true and target has owner, apply suppression to owner instead of target

UseOwner.description: If true and target has owner, applies suppression to owner instead.

AmountPerElement.description: Flat bonus uses per additional squad member. Formula: newUses = base + (this * (squaddieCount-1)).

MaxIncreasePct.description: Maximum percentage increase cap. 0-100 scale, divided by 100.0 internally. Limits total increase.

SkillFilter.description: Optional filter for which skills receive bonus uses. If null, applies to all limited-use skills.

UsesPerSquaddie.description: Flat bonus uses granted per additional squaddie member. Formula: baseUses + (UsesPerSquaddie * (squaddieCount - 1))

UsesPerSquaddiePercent.description: Percentage bonus uses per squaddie. Calculated as: baseUses + (baseUses * UsesPerSquaddiePercent / 100.0). The lower of flat or percentage bonus is used.

HideWhenUnusable.description: If true, hides skill button in UI when charge cannot be used (for player-controlled units).

Range.description: Maximum tile distance to search for valid charge targets. Used in CanBeUsed/IsUsable to define search area.

effectData.description: Reference to the Charge ScriptableObject containing effect configuration data.

OnHitSkillTemplate.description: Skill triggered on successful charge hit.

HideWhenUnusable.description: If true, hides skill button in UI when charge cannot be used.

Range.description: Maximum tile distance for charge target search (inherited from BaseEffect).

skill.description: Reference to the parent Skill object.

effectData.description: Reference to the ChargeInfantry ScriptableObject containing effect configuration.

ChanceAtCenter.description: Base removal chance (0-100 integer) at center tile. Formula: effective = ChanceAtCenter - (distance * ChanceDropoffWithDistance).

ChanceDropoffWithDistance.description: Chance reduction (integer) per tile from center. Subtracted from ChanceAtCenter.

EffectToClear.description: Type of tile effect to remove

ChancePerTileFromCenter.description: Percentage reduction per tile of distance from center

Skill.description: Reference to the skill using this effect

SkillFilter.description: Filter determining which skills trigger consumption (removes parent skill). Can be null (any skill triggers).

ParentSkill.description: Reference to the parent skill that will be removed when triggered.

EffectData.description: Reference to the effect data ScriptableObject containing configuration.

IsAppliedOnlyToPassengers.description: If true AND target has passenger (entity+0x68), damage is applied to passenger instead of vehicle. If no passenger, damage is NOT applied.

ElementsHitPercentage.description: Fraction of elements to hit (0.0-1.0, NOT 0-100). Result is ceiling'd. Combined with FlatDamageBase for total hit count.

DamageFlatAmount.description: Flat HP damage added to total. Formula: totalDamage = DamageFlatAmount + currentHP% + maxHP%.

DamagePctCurrentHitpoints.description: Percentage of target's CURRENT HP as damage (0.0-1.0). 0.10 = 10% of current HP.

DamagePctCurrentHitpointsMin.description: Minimum floor for current HP% damage. If currentHP * pct < this value, use this minimum instead.

DamagePctMaxHitpoints.description: Percentage of target's MAX HP as damage (0.0-1.0). 0.25 = 25% of max HP.

DamagePctMaxHitpointsMin.description: Minimum floor for max HP% damage. Prevents maxHP% damage from becoming negligible.

DismemberChance.description: Additive bonus to dismember chance. Only applies if FatalityType=0. Uses 0-100 percentage.

field_0x5c.name: FlatDamage
field_0x5c.description: Base flat damage value. Formula: totalDmg = FlatDamage + ceil(maxHP * PercentDamage). Minimum 1 damage enforced.

field_0x74.name: MinDamageFromElementCount
field_0x74.description: Minimum damage floor for element-based damage calculation. NOT unused. In DamageOverTime, this is ArmorDamageOnly (bool).
field_0x74.note: Different meaning in Damage vs DamageOverTime handlers

field_0x80.name: FatalityType
field_0x80.description: Death animation type enum. 0=Normal (allows dismemberment), non-zero=special fatality (prevents dismemberment).

field_0x90.name: CanCrit
field_0x90.description: Enables critical hit calculation. Copied to DamageInfo.CanCrit (offset 0x4e). Default true.

FlatDamageBase.description: Base number of element hits before percentage calculation. Formula: hitCount = FlatDamageBase + ceil(elementCount * ElementsHitPercentage).

DamageToArmor.description: Flat armor durability damage. Directly reduces target's armor durability.

ArmorDmgPctCurrent.description: Percentage of current armor durability as damage.

FatalityType.description: Death animation enum for killed targets.

ArmorDmgFromElementCount.description: Armor damage multiplied by number of elements hit.

CanCrit.description: Whether this damage can critically hit.

DamagePercentageOfMaxDurability.description: Percentage of MAX armor durability as damage (0.0-1.0).

DamagePercentageOfCurrentDurability.description: Percentage of CURRENT armor durability as damage (0.0-1.0).

ElementsHitPercentage.description: Multiplier for target element count. Scale: 0.0-1.0 (NOT 0-100). Used in hits calculation.

DamagePerTurn.description: Flat HP damage per tick. Formula: totalDmg = maxHPDmg + this + currentHPDmg.

DamagePctCurrentHitpoints.description: Percentage of target's CURRENT HP as damage. Scale: 0.0-1.0. Clamped to min at 0x70.

DamagePctCurrentHitpointsMin.description: Minimum floor for currentHP% damage. Formula: max(currentHP * pct, this).

DamagePctMaxHitpoints.description: Percentage of target's MAX HP as damage. Scale: 0.0-1.0 (e.g., 0.05 = 5%). Clamped to min at 0x68.

DamagePctMaxHitpointsMin.description: Minimum floor for maxHP% damage. Formula: max(maxHP * pct, this).

PercentDamage.description: Percentage of max HP per tick

FlatDamageFromMaxHP.description: Flat bonus damage derived from max HP

PercentDamageFromElementCount.description: Damage scaling per element in unit

ArmorDamageOnly.description: If true AND target has armor > 0, skip HP damage entirely. Only apply armor durability damage.

ArmorDmgFlat.description: Flat armor damage when ArmorDamageOnly is true

ArmorDmgPctCurrent.description: Percentage of current armor as damage

ArmorDmgFlat2.description: Secondary flat armor damage / Armor penetration

FatalityType.description: Death animation type when DoT kills

ElementsHitBase.description: Base element hit count. Formula: hits = ceil(targetElements * ElementsHitPct) + this, minimum 1.

ArmorDamageFlat.description: Flat armor durability damage per tick. Direct damage to entity+0x5C via SetArmorDurability().

ArmorDamagePctCurrent.description: Percentage of CURRENT armor durability as damage (0.0-1.0). Uses entity+0x5C, NOT max armor.

ArmorDamagePctElements.description: Armor damage multiplied by element count. Formula: elementCount * this value. NOT a percentage.

ArmorDamageExtra.description: Secondary armor damage passed to DamageInfo+0x38 during HP damage. Goes through damage pipeline, not direct durability.

Chance.description: Probability (0-100 integer) that deathrattle triggers. Uses PseudoRandom.NextPercent() comparison. Default 100.

skill.description: Reference to the parent skill that owns this handler. Used to get entity/owner information.

effectData.description: Reference to the Deathrattle effect data containing configuration for the death trigger.

SkillFilter.description: Filter that determines which skills to disable. Iterates entity's skills, calls ISkillFilter.Matches().

HideDisabledSkills.description: If true, also sets skill.UsableByPlayer=false (hides from UI). Otherwise only sets skill.Enabled=false.

LocaKey.description: Localization key for the text to display.

FallbackText.description: Text used if locaKey is not found.

AllowRemount.description: If true, allows the ejected unit to re-enter vehicles and grants RemountSkillTemplate. If false, target must be entrance tile.

RemountSkillTemplate.description: Skill template granted to the ejected actor when AllowRemount=true, enabling vehicle re-entry capability.

field_0x10.description: Reference to the parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

field_0x18.description: Pointer to the effect data template containing configuration

SkillToAdd.description: ChangePropertyAura-based skill to emit to all allied entities on mission start and spawn.

ExcludeSelf.description: If true, the emitting entity does not receive the aura skill.

Condition.description: Condition evaluated in IsEnabled. TRUE=enabled, FALSE=disabled.

SkillFilter.description: Filter determining which skills trigger this effect. Can be null (any skill triggers).

ParentSkill.description: Reference to the parent skill that owns this handler.

EffectData.description: Reference to the effect data ScriptableObject containing configuration.

SkillTemplate.description: Reference to skill template to create and add when trigger skill is used. Removed at round end.

RefreshOnUse.description: If true and skill already exists on actor, remove it before re-adding (refresh behavior).

OwnerSkill.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler (parent weapon skill)

EffectData.description: Reference to the HeatCapacity ScriptableObject effect data containing configuration

CurrentHeat.description: Current accumulated heat value. Reset to 0 on mission start. Increases by HeatPerUse on each weapon fire.

MaxHeat.description: Heat threshold for overheat. Weapon cannot fire when heat >= MaxHeat. Default 5.

CooldownPerRound.description: Heat change per round (negative = cooling). Default -1.

SyncHeatAcrossSkills.description: If true, heat is synchronized across all skills on the same item (e.g., multiple fire modes). Default true.

Condition.description: Condition evaluated with actor context. TRUE=visible, FALSE=hidden (result is inverted).

ChanceToApply.description: Probability (0-100 integer) to ignore incoming damage. Uses PseudoRandom.NextTry(). Default 100.

ReductionPercent.description: Percentage of damage absorbed when triggered (0-100). Reduces both HP and armor damage.

RequiredTags.description: Attacking skill must have all these tags for absorption to apply.

ActionPointPercentage.description: Percentage of normal AP cost (0-100). 0 = free action, 50 = half cost. Default 50.

SkillTemplate.description: Skill template to match for interception.

PercentChange.description: Percentage to modify AP (divided by 100.0 to get multiplier). Replaces the original delta.

OncePerRound.description: If true, can only trigger once per tactical round.

LastUsedRound.description: Round number when handler was last consumed (for once-per-round logic)

BaseChance.description: Starting jam chance (0-100 integer). Copied to accumulated chance at round start.

ChancePerUse.description: Additional jam chance (0-100 integer) added per weapon use. Accumulates until jam occurs.

skill.description: Reference to the parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

jammingConfig.description: Reference to the Jamming configuration ScriptableObject

accumulatedFailChance.description: Current accumulated fail chance (increases each use by FailChancePerUse)

jammedOnTurn.description: Turn number when weapon jammed. Set to -100 (0xFFFFFF9C) when not jammed

baseFailChance.description: Base fail chance percentage at start of each round. Copied to handler.accumulatedFailChance on round start

failChancePerUse.description: Additional fail chance added per weapon use. Accumulated in handler.accumulatedFailChance

jammingSound.description: Audio clip played when weapon jams. Used with Stem_ID.Play3D() for positional audio

liftOffDelay.description: Delay before liftoff in seconds. Used with WaitForSeconds(). Default 0.75s.

landingDelay.description: Delay after landing in seconds. Used with WaitForSeconds().

heightFactor.description: Flight height as multiplier of distance. Height = distance * heightFactor, capped at maxHeight. Default 0.25.

maxHeight.description: Maximum flight arc height cap in units. Clamps height calculation. Default 4.0.

LiftOffDelay.description: Delay in seconds before takeoff animation. Default 0.75s. NOT flight duration.

HeightFactor.description: Height multiplier based on distance. Default 0.25.

MaxHeight.description: Maximum flight height in world units. Default 4.0.

AnimatorTrigger.description: Animation trigger to play during flight.

DurationPerUnitOfDistance.description: Jump duration multiplier per tile. Formula: duration = distance * this. Default 0.05 sec/tile.

MaxDuration.description: Maximum jump duration cap in seconds. Formula: min(distance * mult, this). Default 0.75s.

MinJumpDistance.description: Minimum distance in tiles to trigger jump animation. If closer, no jump plays. Default 2.0 tiles.

Event.description: Determines which game event decrements lifetime counter. Effect removed when counter reaches 0.

enum_values.0: Rounds - decrements at round start (skips round 0)
enum_values.1: TurnStart - decrements at turn start (skips turn 0)
enum_values.2: TurnEnd - decrements at turn end (skips turn 0)
enum_values.3: EffectApplied - decrements when effect hits target

Turns.description: Initial number of charges/duration. Determines how many times the trigger event can occur before effect is removed. Default: 1

RefreshOnApply.description: If true, reapplying the effect resets the remaining counter to initial Turns value

MaxDamagePercent.description: Maximum HP loss per hit as fraction of max HP (0.0-1.0). 0.25 = max 25% HP lost per hit.

Amount.description: Maximum suppression to recover when killing enemy element. Default 10. Clamped to current suppression.

MaxSuppReduction.description: Maximum suppression points to reduce on kill

ShowTextOnSuppReduction.description: If true, shows floating text/icon on suppression recovery.

enum_values.0: OnRoundStart - plays at start of each round
enum_values.1: OnTurnStart - plays at start of unit's turn (default)
enum_values.2: OnTurnEnd - plays at end of unit's turn
enum_values.3: OnEffectApplied - plays when effect applied to target
enum_values.4: OnSkillAdded - plays when skill is added to unit

SoundToPlay.description: FMOD sound event ID. Played via Stem_ID.Play3D() for 3D positional audio at entity location.
FMOD sound ID to play when enabled state changes. Triggers on frame when effect transitions from disabled to enabled.

RestorePct.description: Percentage of max ammo to restore. Scale: 0.0-1.0. Formula: ammoAdd = max(maxAmmo * this, MinAmount).

SkillFilter.description: Optional filter for which skills get ammo refilled. If null, refills all skills with ammo.

MinAmount.description: Minimum ammo to restore regardless of percentage. Acts as floor value.

HitpointsHealedPctMax.description: Percentage of MAX HP to heal per trigger. Scale: 0.0-1.0 (NOT 0-100). Capped at 100% HP.

field_0x5c.description: HealPercentage (float) - percentage of max HP to heal

OwningSkill.description: Pointer to the Skill instance that owns this handler. Used to access the entity and call OnEffectApplied after removal completes.

EffectData.description: Pointer to the RemoveSkill effect template data. Contains TriggerMode and SkillsToRemove list. Set during Create factory method.

TriggerMode.description: Determines when skill removal is triggered. Values: 0=OnUse, 1=OnAdded, 2=OnRemoved, 3=OnEffectApplied. Each handler callback checks this value.

SkillsToRemove.description: List of skill templates to match and remove.

IsRemoved.description: Flag on BaseSkill indicating the skill has been marked for removal. Checked by ShouldSkillBeRemoved to avoid double-processing. Set by RemoveSelf.

SkillsList.description: The list of skills on the entity's skill container. Iterated during RemoveSkills to find matching skills.

RestorePercent.description: Percentage of MAX armor durability to restore (0-100). Formula: ceil(RestorePercent / 100.0 * MaxDurability).

SpawnTrigger.description: Controls when spawning occurs. Value 1 = deferred (OnUse), other values = immediate spawn on skill activation.

EntityToSpawn.description: Template to spawn. At offset 0x88 has entity type: 2=TransientActor (mobile), 1=Structure (static). At 0xC4 has CanBeContained flag.

SpawnAsMinion.description: Non-zero = registers spawned entity as minion with unique MinionID, links to ICommandMinionSkill handler.

AnimatorParameter.description: Animation parameter to set on spawn for visual effects.

FaceOwner.description: If true, spawned entity calculates and faces toward its owner entity on spawn.

MaxNumberOfSpawns.description: Maximum entities that can be spawned. 0 = unlimited. Tracked via spawned entity list at handler offset 0x20.

HideWhenMaxReached.description: If true, hides skill from UI when MaxNumberOfSpawns limit is reached.

Amount.description: Number of gore effect prefabs to spawn. Default 12.

Prefabs.description: List of gore prefabs to randomly select from.

MinScale.description: Minimum scale for spawned gore. Default 1.0.

MaxScale.description: Maximum scale for spawned gore. Default 2.0.

Event.description: Trigger type for spawning tile effects.

enum_values.0: OnUse - effect spawns when skill used (immediate)
enum_values.1: OnTileChanged - effect spawns when actor moves
enum_values.2: OnDeath - effect spawns at actor's death position

EffectToSpawn.description: Reference to TileEffectTemplate to instantiate. Can be ApplySkillTileEffect for recursive effects.

ChanceAtCenter.description: Base probability (0-100%) at center tile. Default 100 = guaranteed. Used in formula: effectiveChance = ChanceAtCenter + (distance * ChancePerTileFromCenter)

ChancePerTileFromCenter.description: Probability modifier per tile distance from center. Typically negative for falloff. Uses diagonal Manhattan distance. Zero = uniform probability.

DelayWithDistance.description: Visual delay in seconds per tile distance. Creates spreading/ripple effect across AOE. Formula: spawnDelay = distance * DelayWithDistance

StartHidden.description: Initial visibility state at mission start. true = starts hidden, false = starts visible.

ToggleUI.description: Whether to toggle owner skill's UI visibility.

LinkedSkill.description: The alternate skill to switch with.

Event.description: ApplyOnEvent enum: 0=OnAdded (skill used immediately when effect added).

SkillToUse.description: Skill template to use when event triggers.

EvaluationDelegate.description: Callback delegate - either ConsiderHeatCapacity or ConsiderReloadingSwitch

OwnerSkill.description: Skill this handler is attached to

field_0x10.description: Reference to the tile this effect is placed on

field_0x18.description: RoundCounter - increments each round, used to calculate remaining rounds

field_0x1c.description: Unknown float parameter set in constructor

field_0x28.description: Reference to the template containing configuration and sounds

field_0x30.description: Reference to the bleeding leader unit

field_0x38.description: UI icon displayed in world space showing bleedout countdown

field_0x40.description: PreviousOccupiedState - stores tile's occupied state before effect was added

tile.description: Reference to the tile containing this effect

startRoundCopy.description: Copy of start round (set in ctor)

iconHeight.description: Height offset for world space icon (0x41a00000 = 20.0f)

InitialBleedRounds.description: Number of rounds the leader has before death (copied to Leader+0x78 on init)

TickSound.description: Sound played each round when the countdown decrements

DeathSound.description: Sound played when countdown reaches zero and leader dies

Tile.description: Reference to the tile where the bleeding leader is located (inherited from TileEffectHandler)

RoundsRemaining.description: Current countdown of rounds until death. Decremented each round in OnRoundStart

InitialRoundsParam.description: Constructor parameter stored, initial round count passed during construction

Template.description: Reference to BleedOutTileEffectTemplate containing configuration (sounds, initial rounds, etc.)

BleedingLeader.description: Reference to the leader who is bleeding out

WorldSpaceIcon.description: UI element displaying remaining rounds above the bleeding leader

PreviousTileOccupancyState.description: Cached tile occupancy state from before bleeding started, restored on removal

StabilizeSound.description: Sound played when leader is stabilized

Sound.description: Sound effect played when skill triggers

RemoveOnTrigger.description: If true, effect is removed after skill application

Condition.description: Optional condition that must pass before skill applies

HasLifetime.description: Whether effect expires after a duration

SkillTemplate.description: Template used to create the skill instance

OwningTile.description: Reference to the tile this effect is attached to (inherited from TileEffectHandler)

SpawnedPrefab.description: Visual prefab instance for the effect (inherited)

LifetimeCounter.description: Number of rounds elapsed since effect was created (inherited)

SkillInstance.description: Instantiated skill object created from SkillTemplate

Tile.description: Reference to the tile this effect is placed on (inherited from TileEffectHandler)

RoundCounter.description: Tracks the round when effect was created for lifetime calculations

RecoverableObjectTemplate.description: Template defining the recoverable object properties

AllowAlliesPickup.description: If true, allied units (not just player-controlled) can pick up the object

RecoverObjective.description: Optional mission objective tracking this recoverable object

SkillToGrant.description: Skill template granted to the picker (creates DropRecoverableObjectHandler)

PickupSound.description: Sound played when object is picked up

CanPickupOnFoot.description: If true, infantry units (mobility type 0) can pick up this object

CanPickupInVehicle.description: If true, vehicle units (mobility type 1) can pick up this object

Tile.description: Reference to the tile this effect is placed on

RoundCounter.description: Tracks the round when effect was created

TeamFilter.description: Team filter for pickup. 0=any team can pickup, otherwise must match actor's team

Tile.description: Reference to the tile this effect is placed on

RoundCounter.description: Tracks the round when effect was created

SkillData.description: Contains data for skill effect including pickup template at +0x58

AllowAllies.description: If true, allied units can also pick up/drop the object

RecoverObjective.description: Reference to the RecoverObject objective tracking this item

field_0x10.description: Reference to the parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

field_0x18.description: Pointer to the effect data template containing configuration

TileEffectTemplate.description: Template for creating RecoverableObjectTileEffectHandler when object is dropped on ground.

HUDIcon.description: Icon displayed on unit HUD when carrying the recoverable object.

APDelta.description: Amount to change action points (positive to add, negative to remove)

ForceSkipTurn.description: If true, forces skip turn when AP reaches 0 regardless of usable skills

LastThresholdIndex.description: Last matched threshold index (-1 if none)

PendingAPRestore.description: Flag indicating AP should be restored from base properties next update

DefectFlags.description: Flags passed to Actor.ApplyRandomDamageEffect to control which damage effects can be applied

Radius.description: Radius for sphere overlap test to find props to destroy

SniperProfile.description: Volume profile used for sniper/scope mode (mode == 2)

DefaultProfile.description: Volume profile used for default/aim modes (mode == 0 or 1)

OverwatchProfile.description: Volume profile used for overwatch mode (mode == 3)

FallbackProfile.description: Fallback profile used for unknown modes or when specific profile is null

UsesPerElement.description: Number of uses granted per living element. Formula: elementCount * UsesPerElement

propertyChanges.description: Array of property modifications to apply (PropertyType + value pairs)

range.description: Maximum tile distance for aura effect

linearFalloff.description: When true, effect strength decreases linearly with distance

originEntity.description: Source entity for distance calculations (aura emitter)

field_0x10.description: Reference to the owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

field_0x24.description: SuppressionCounter - Incremented when pinned, used for mobility penalty calculation

field_0x58.description: SuppressedSound - Audio ID played when entering Suppressed state

field_0x60.description: PinnedDownSound - Audio ID played when entering PinnedDown state

field_0x68.description: PinnedSkillTemplate - Skill template added when pinned (e.g., break free skill), removed when not pinned

field_0x10.description: Reference to the owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

field_0x24.description: SuppressionCounter - Incremented when pinned, used for mobility penalty calculation

field_0x58.description: PinnedDownSound - Audio ID played when entering PinnedDown state

field_0x60.description: PinnedDropdownText - Text displayed in unit HUD when pinned

field_0x68.description: PinnedSkillTemplate - Skill template added when pinned, removed when not pinned

field_0x10.description: Active flag - true while effect is playing
Reference to the skill that owns this handler (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

field_0x18.description: Reference to the Rescue skill effect configuration

field_0x10.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

field_0x18.description: Reference to the StopBleedout skill effect configuration

BonusActionPoints.description: Number of bonus action points granted on kill

RemoveAfterTrigger.description: If true, removes the skill after triggering (one-time use)

RequiredState.description: The morale state value that the actor must be in for the skill effect to be enabled. Compared against actor's current morale state retrieved via vtable call at offset 0x468.

RequiredStance.description: The stance value that the actor must be in for the skill effect to be enabled. Compared against actor's current stance stored at actor+0xD0.

BlockingTags.description: A list of tags that, if found on any of the actor's other skills, will disable this skill effect. Initialized in .ctor using TagType reflection. Uses ContainsAllTags for matching.

HasLifetime.description: Whether effect expires after a duration

StatusEffectTemplate.description: Skill template for the status effect to apply

RequiredTags.description: Entity must have at least one of these tags to receive effect

ExcludedTags.description: Entity must NOT have any of these tags to receive effect

RemoveOnLeave.description: If true, status effect is removed when entity leaves tile

OwningTile.description: Reference to the tile this effect is attached to (inherited)

SpawnedPrefab.description: Visual prefab instance for the effect (inherited)

EffectGroup.description: Collection of TileEffectTemplate references to clear

RemoveAll.description: If true, removes ALL instances of each effect type; if false, removes one per type

Skill.description: Reference to the skill using this effect

Effect.description: Configuration for the group clear effect

Damage.description: Final calculated damage amount. Modified by damage reduction effects.

ArmorDmgFlat.description: Flat armor durability damage. DivineIntervention zeros this to prevent kill.

ArmorDmgPct.description: Percentage-based armor damage. Modified by IgnoreDamageEffect.

Skill.description: Reference to the owning skill instance

EffectData.description: Pointer to the effect configuration data (ScriptableObject)

il2cpp_object_header.description: Standard Unity IL2CPP object header (class pointer, GC info)

Skill.description: Reference to the skill instance that owns this handler

Template.description: Reference to the effect template (ScriptableObject data asset)

field_0x10.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler

field_0x18.description: Reference to the effect template defining this handler's behavior

field_0x10.description: Reference to the skill this handler belongs to

OwningSkill.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler

EffectData.description: Reference to the effect data/configuration object

field_+0x148.description: Current action points (via array access at [0x29])

field_+0x160.description: Current morale value (via array access at [0x2C])

field_0x148.description: Current action points (via array access at [0x29])

field_0x160.description: Current morale value (via array access at [0x2C])

field_+0x115.description: UsableWhenPinnedDown - allows skill use even in PinnedDown state

field_0x115.description: UsableWhenPinnedDown - allows skill use even in PinnedDown state

isHeavyWeaponDeployed.description: Flag indicating whether a heavy weapon (MG, mortar, etc) is currently deployed/set up

currentStance.description: Current stance of the actor, affects heavy weapon deployment

elements.description: List of Element components attached to this Actor

deployedWeaponTransform.description: Reference to currently deployed weapon's transform (null when not deployed)

savedLocalPosition.description: Saved local position of weapon before deployment

savedLocalRotation.description: Saved local rotation of weapon before deployment

canSetup.description: Flag indicating enough AP for setup after deploy

canFire.description: Flag indicating enough AP for firing

needsMoreAP.description: Flag indicating not enough AP for full combo

muzzleDirection.description: Reference to muzzle direction data from actor

elementAnimator.description: Reference to animator for aim direction

ParentSkill.description: Reference to the skill that owns this effect handler

EffectConfig.description: Configuration data for the spawn effect

SpawnedEntities.description: Tracks currently spawned entities for max spawn enforcement

EntityTemplate.description: Template defining what entity to spawn

SpawnAsMinion.description: If true, assigns MinionID and registers with command skills

AnimatorParameter.description: Animation trigger for spawn visual effects

FaceOwner.description: If true, spawned entity faces its owner on spawn

HideWhenMaxReached.description: Hide skill from UI when spawn limit reached

SkillTemplate.description: Template for skill the minion will use

Template.description: Template this actor was spawned from

ParameterName.description: The string name of the animator parameter (bool, trigger, float, etc.)

CachedHash.description: Cached animator hash value computed from ParameterName via Animator.StringToHash()

AnimatorParameterNameTemplate.description: Reference to template containing the bool parameter name to set
Reference to template containing the trigger parameter name

DelaySeconds.description: Delay in seconds before triggering the animator parameter

AnimationSequence.description: Reference to the AnimationSequence asset to play

Skill.description: Reference to the parent Skill object that owns this handler. Used for GetActor() and displaying skill feedback.

EffectData.description: Reference to the effect data ScriptableObject containing configuration. Set during Create().

HasTriggeredThisRound.description: Flag indicating whether divine intervention has already been used this round. Reset to false on OnRoundStart, set to true when protection triggers.

ParentSkill.description: Reference to the parent skill that owns this handler.

EffectData.description: Reference to the effect data ScriptableObject containing configuration.

AccumulatedDamage.description: Runtime state: Accumulated damage since last trigger or mission start.

LastTriggerRound.description: Runtime state: Round number when skill was last triggered (for OncePerRound check).

HpLostThreshold.description: HP loss threshold as percentage of max HP (e.g., 25 = 25%). Skill triggers when accumulated damage reaches this percent. Default: 25.

SkillTemplate.description: Reference to skill template to create and use on self when HP loss threshold is met.

OncePerRound.description: If true, skill can only trigger once per round. Tracked via LastTriggerRound runtime state. Default: true.

includeTags.description: List of tags that an item MUST have to be considered for disabling. When includeTagFilterMode is 0 (Any), item needs at least one matching tag. When mode is 1 (All), item needs all tags.

includeTagFilterMode.description: Controls how includeTags are matched. 0=Any (item needs at least one tag), 1=All (item needs all tags to match)

excludeTags.description: List of tags that an item must NOT have. When excludeTagFilterMode is 0 (Any), item is excluded if it has any of these tags. When mode is 1 (All), item is excluded only if it has all these tags.

excludeTagFilterMode.description: Controls how excludeTags are matched. 0=Any (exclude if item has any tag), 1=All (exclude only if item has all tags)

selectedItem (handler field).description: The DisableItemHandler stores a reference to the randomly selected disabled item at handler+0x20. This is used by OnRemoved to re-enable the item.

HitFirstElementOnly.description: If true, only damages first element/squaddie instead of distributing

PercentDamage.description: Damage as percentage of target's max HP (0.0-1.0)

MinDamageFromMaxHP.description: Minimum damage floor based on max HP percentage

PercentDamageFromElementCount.description: Damage scaling multiplier per element in target squad

MinDamageFromElementCount.description: Minimum damage floor from element count calculation

FlatDamage.description: Base flat damage value added to calculated damage

FlatDamageFromMaxHP.description: Additional flat damage calculated from max HP

ArmorDamageOnly.description: If true in DOT context, only damages armor durability not HP

ArmorDmgPctCurrent.description: Armor damage as percentage of current armor durability

ArmorPenetration.description: Armor penetration value subtracted from target armor for penetration roll

ArmorDmgPctFromElementCount.description: Armor damage scaling per element count

ElementHitMinIndex.description: Minimum element index to target when distributing damage

CanCrit.description: Whether this damage can critically hit

AoeShape.description: 2D boolean array defining custom AOE shape pattern

UseCustomAoEShape.description: If true, uses CustomAoEShapeObject instead of AoeShape array

CustomAoEShapeObject.description: Custom AOE shape implementation for dynamic shapes

HasAoe.description: Non-zero if skill has AOE component (used as flag)

AoeFilter.description: Optional filter to exclude tiles from AOE (e.g., line of sight check)

SkillTemplate.description: Template for creating the skill instance that applies damage

RemoveOnTrigger.description: If true, tile effect is removed after skill triggers once

Condition.description: Optional condition checked before applying skill to target

HitDirection.description: Direction damage came from (for armor facing)

Damage.description: Final calculated damage amount to apply

BaseSkill.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler

PropertyChanges.description: Array of property modifications to apply

Properties.description: Array of property modifiers applied while in deployed stance. Each entry is 12 bytes: PropertyType (uint32), Value (int32), MultValue (float).

EffectSkill.description: Skill template to add when morale reaches maximum. Skill is instantiated and added to actor's SkillContainer when morale >= MoraleMax, removed when below.

last_verification: 2026-03-07 - Bulk verification of Damage, Chance, Duration fields
